content.text:
EXECUTIVE MORNING BRIEFING — Wed, Mar 18, 2026 (America/Chicago)

1) Revenue (last 24h)
- No validated revenue data available in current context (transaction feed not reachable).

2) Agent network health
- Status: DEGRADED
- Gateway connection is failing with “pairing required / abnormal closure,” which blocks live checks (sessions, nodes, cron telemetry).

3) Priority items requiring attention
- Re-establish gateway pairing/connection to restore agent telemetry.
- Reconnect/verify revenue source (GHL/checkout feed) for 24h reporting.
- Reconnect calendar feed so pre-call and day-plan briefs can populate.

4) Today’s calendar preview
- Unavailable (no accessible calendar events feed at runtime).

5) Key metrics vs targets
- Cannot compute current KPI vs target deltas until gateway + data feeds are restored.
- Immediate blocker: observability/data connectivity, not execution capacity.
